findings.detail: Template names felt a bit technical rather than friendly or descriptive.
findings.proposed_solution: Use more plain-language template labels that describe the style in everyday terms.

findings.detail: There are only 3 palettes, so visual choices may feel a little limited.
findings.proposed_solution: Show clearer visual previews or stronger differences between the 4 templates.

findings.detail: The chat box accepted input, but it wasn’t obvious what happened after sending.
findings.proposed_solution: After chat messages are sent, show a visible response or confirmation so it feels useful.

warnings.detail: Template names felt a bit technical rather than friendly or descriptive.
There are only 3 palettes, so visual choices may feel a little limited.
The chat box accepted input, but it wasn’t obvious what happened after sending.
